name: Sakurasou no Pet na Kanojo-now with you in it!
description:
Wanted an RPG-like bot but since my tech skills are under a frog's ass, i rather add the most important characters from the show and let the user do as they will!

All characters are 18+ years old.

This will be plenty of tokens, i hope it won't function badly because of it.
creator: Totallynotamultiplecharacterbotmaker
